overall.description: Gameplay footage from a truck driving simulator showing a first-person perspective from inside a semi-truck cabin. The truck navigates through a busy shipping port area, following a dark sedan through checkpoints and narrow corridors between stacked shipping containers. The environment features industrial warehouses, container cranes, and dense container storage areas under clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: main port access road with industrial warehouses

agents.ego_description: driving straight on the main port road, following a dark sedan ahead

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving steadily ahead on the port road

entered.detail: large gray industrial warehouse with multiple loading bays
chain-link fence running along the right side of the road
tall container cranes visible in the distance against the sky
small security booth structure at the upcoming intersection

segments.scene_description: The truck drives along a wide asphalt road in an industrial port area. An industrial warehouse runs along the right side behind a chain-link fence, while open space and distant container cranes are visible to the left. The truck follows a dark sedan ahead as it approaches a checkpoint area.

scene_state.functional_zone: port security checkpoint and container yard entrance

events.description: approaching and entering the port checkpoint area with security barriers
passing through the checkpoint gate, following the sedan into the container yard

agents.ego_description: making a left turn at the port checkpoint, navigating through the security gate

notable_agents.action: sedan turning left through the checkpoint gate ahead

entered.detail: stack of green shipping containers visible after passing the checkpoint
stack of orange shipping containers on the right side of the yard
automated barrier arm at the checkpoint entrance

segments.scene_description: The truck makes a left turn through a security checkpoint, passing a booth and barrier gate. The scene transitions from the main road into a container yard, with stacks of green and orange shipping containers becoming visible on both sides. The truck follows the sedan through the checkpoint into the port facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: container storage yard with stacked containers

events.description: making a right turn to navigate through the container yard

agents.ego_description: navigating through the container yard, making a right turn to follow the sedan

notable_agents.action: sedan driving ahead through the container yard, leading the way

entered.detail: stack of white shipping containers on the left side
low industrial warehouse building with corrugated metal walls
multi-colored container stack with various shipping company logos

segments.scene_description: The truck drives through the open container yard, making a right turn to follow the sedan. White container stacks appear on the left while a low warehouse building and multi-colored container stacks are visible on the right. Large port cranes remain visible in the background against the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: container terminal roadway with stacked containers on both sides

events.description: turning right to enter a narrow corridor between container stacks

agents.ego_description: driving straight through the container terminal before turning right into a narrow passage

notable_agents.action: sedan continuing straight and then turning into the narrow corridor

entered.detail: opening between tall container stacks marking the entrance to a narrow passage
orange traffic cones marking the edge of the roadway

segments.scene_description: The truck continues driving through the container terminal with stacks of containers on both sides. The road is marked with traffic cones on the left. As the truck approaches a narrow corridor entrance between tall container stacks, it prepares to turn right, following the sedan into the confined passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between tall shipping container stacks

events.description: entering the narrow enclosed corridor between tall container stacks, sky becomes mostly blocked

agents.ego_description: carefully driving through the narrow corridor between tall shipping containers, maintaining distance from the sedan

notable_agents.action: sedan driving ahead through the narrow container passage

entered.detail: tall stack of shipping containers forming a wall on the left side of the narrow passage
tall stack of shipping containers forming a wall on the right side
shipping container with 'JETSAM' logo visible on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The truck enters a narrow enclosed corridor between towering stacks of shipping containers, creating a canyon-like effect with the sky mostly blocked above. The passage is tight with containers walls on both sides, including one with a visible 'JETSAM' logo. The truck follows the sedan carefully through this confined industrial corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it moves from a wide industrial road into a claustrophobic canyon of shipping containers. It begins by following a dark sedan along an open asphalt road past a chain-link fence and distant port cranes before turning left through a security checkpoint. As the truck enters the port facility, the environment shifts into an expansive container yard where the camera tracks the sedan past stacks of green, orange, and white containers and low warehouse buildings. The scene then narrows as the truck passes traffic cones and turns right, transitioning from the open terminal toward a confined entrance. Finally, the view closes in completely as the truck enters a tight corridor of towering container walls, including one marked with a JETSAM logo, which blocks out the sky to create a dense industrial passage.
